title: Lizzy | Christmas Window Stickers | Blue, One Size, Rectangular Gel | Glitter Snowflake Designs, Static Cling, Reusable | Festive Xmas Window Decorations for Home & Shop Displays
features: Sparkle Your Space Instantly ✨; blue glitter snowflake window stickers create a magical winter scene; ideal for transforming living room windows or shop displays without any mess or residue
Effortless Festive Decorating ❄️; static-cling gel stickers apply to glass, mirrors or tiles in seconds; simply peel and place for mess-free Christmas window decorations at home, school or office
Year After Year Reusability ♻️; gel material allows stickers to be removed and stored flat for future seasons; suitable for those seeking sustainable Christmas crafts and décor
Versatile Winter Charm 🌨️; rectangular sheets fit windows, patio doors or conservatories; add snowy style to retail displays, classrooms or festive events with reusable snowflake window stickers
Designed for Convenience 🎄; lightweight pack at just 33 grams makes decorating easy anywhere; enjoy flexible placement for winter parties, Christmas crafts or adding charm to any glass surface
